frameworks.name: signal-detection theory
frameworks.one_line: Background for treating emotion appropriateness as a graded perceptual judgment.

core_question: Can graphic-novel-style emotion storyboards replace written vignettes as stimuli for studying social judgments of emotion?
key_assumptions: Context is necessary for judging emotional appropriateness
Engagement and completion time index method efficiency
manipulations: Stimulus format: emotion storyboard vs written vignette (between-subject random assignment)
key_findings: Storyboards yielded rating distributions comparable to vignettes
Storyboards led to shorter task completion times
interpretations: Emotion storyboards are a viable alternative to vignettes for context-rich emotion-judgment research
